newsSince: Q1 2026 robotics LiDAR shipments surged 1,458.8% YoY to 185,500 units, surpassing the automotive ADAS business for the first time (>56% of total); RoboSense holds the #1 global robotics 3D-LiDAR position across five sub-sectors and guided FY26 deliveries of 2-2.7M units. Offsetting this, the company completed a dilutive follow-on equity offering (~22M shares, ~HKD1B), which alongside broad robotics derating drove the -28% move since June 9.

sources.label: BigGo: RoboSense Q1 robot LiDAR shipments surge 1,458%
Simply Wall St: RoboSense Q1 loss revives profitability concern
PRNewswire: RoboSense global robotics LiDAR dominance Q1 2026
SimplyWallSt: valuation after follow-on / share performance

verdicts.rankRationale: Robotics-stack purity confirmed: robotics LiDAR now >56% of mix (+1,458% YoY), #1 global rank across 5 sub-sectors, FY26 guide 2-2.7M units. Strongest humanoid/robotics-sensor volume claim in the basket and less US-crowded than Ouster; should move up vs peers. Tempered by dilutive follow-on offering.
verdicts.bull: #1 global robotics LiDAR; robot volumes now exceed auto; FY26 2-2.7M unit guide; cleaner robotics pure-play than peers.
verdicts.neutral: Volume leadership real but margins thin; equity raise dilutes; -40% YTD reflects sentiment reset.
verdicts.bear: Follow-on dilution, cash-burn, LiDAR ASP erosion; robotics LiDAR still pre-profit at scale.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Robotics LiDAR volume ramp / FY26 2-2.7M guide
